text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp starts today, and it's<n>time for Narita
Taishin to focus on<n>improving her skills ahead of
the<n>Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her social battery is running emptier<n>than usual
since being at camp forces<n>her into closer quarters
with others.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I manage to find a quiet spot to help<n>ease her
nerves and allow her to train<n>at her own pace.
